cluely_com.cluely_weakness: Paid subscription, closed-source, data privacy concerns, ethics controversy — all exploitable by Natively's free/open-source/local positioning

finalroundai_com.finalroundai_weakness: Very expensive ($90-300/month), no refund policy, taskbar visible to proctoring — price and detection are attack vectors

interviews_ai.note: Different audience (B2B recruiter tool) — low direct competition for candidate-facing keywords
